summary: FR-SHARE-001 (JSON Export & Import) implementation is complete on feature/17-json-export-import. All 7 required test IDs from issue #17 are satisfied: T-FE-SHARE-001-01 through T-FE-SHARE-001-04 (unit + component), T-E2E-AFOL-001-01, T-E2E-ERR-001-01, T-SEC-SEC-001-01 (e2e + security). PR #55 is open from feature/17-json-export-import -> main. Implementation was already complete; this agent merged the full test suite from feature/17-frontend-tests, verified contract alignment, updated PR #55 with complete traceability, and requested Copilot review.

recommended_actions: Review PR #55 (feature/17-json-export-import -> main) for FR-SHARE-001 implementation
Verify exportService.ts satisfies all test contracts from PR #51
Check ActionBar.tsx for correct data-testid attributes (btn-export, btn-import)
Verify Notification.tsx uses .includes('error') for robust error detection
Check that all 7 test IDs are present in the test files
Approve and merge PR #55 once CI passes
